## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Real device? Specific phrases tested? -->

- [ ] Builds clean (`xcodebuild` or Xcode ⌘B) on both schemes
- [ ] Tested on Apple Watch (model: ___ , watchOS ___)
- [ ] Tested voice flow with at least: `15 sıfır` / `fifteen love` / `oyun` / `kort değiştir`
- [ ] Match history / undo still works
- [ ] No new compiler warnings

## Secret-leak check

- [ ] `git diff --cached` reviewed — no API keys, tokens, or other secrets included
- [ ] Did not modify `.gitignore` to expose `xcuserdata/` or scheme files

<!-- If UI changed, drop a before/after screenshot or short clip. -->
